input.background: A South African study compared whether participating in a 5-year follow-up interview was associated with having medical aid (similar to health insurance).
input.question: Data for black participants are shown. Analyze the results for this stratum.

output.answer: Nine percent of both groups had medical aid. Therefore, there is no association between follow-up and having medical aid in this stratum.

Medical Aid.description: Having medical aid (health insurance) or not.

Follow-up + Medical Aid +.description: Number of black participants who participated in the follow-up and have medical aid.

Follow-up + Medical Aid -.description: Number of black participants who participated in the follow-up and do not have medical aid.

Follow-up - Medical Aid +.description: Number of black participants who did not participate in the follow-up and have medical aid.

Follow-up - Medical Aid -.description: Number of black participants who did not participate in the follow-up and do not have medical aid.

meta_info.caption: Is participating in a follow-up survey associated with having medical aid?
